content: We're doing 10K boxes/month but repeat rate is stuck at 18%. Tried email flows, WhatsApp nudges, even a loyalty program — nothing moves the needle. Anyone cracked D2C retention beyond the first purchase? Would love to jam with someone who's figured this out.

Just crossed 50 developers on the free tier of StackAuth but zero conversions to paid. The product is sticky — usage is high — but nobody wants to pay. Any PLG folks here who've solved the free-to-paid gap? Happy to share our auth infra learnings in return.

Sharing a lesson from CRED: we tested 14 different reward mechanics last quarter. The winner wasn't the biggest reward — it was the one with the shortest feedback loop. Instant gratification > delayed value. Applies to any product with a habit loop.

I've been a PM at Swiggy for 4 years and I'm seriously considering the founder leap. The idea is in logistics-tech. Would love to connect with founders who've made the corporate-to-startup jump recently. How did you validate your idea while still employed?

Hot take: influencer marketing for D2C brands is broken. We're seeing 80% of ROI come from micro-creators (under 10K followers), not the big names. Built a playbook at Lenskart around this — happy to share the framework with anyone building a creator program.

Curious about B2B SaaS growth — feels like a completely different muscle from consumer. At Zepto, everything is about speed and frequency. In SaaS, it seems like activation and expansion matter more. Anyone from B2B willing to do a growth framework exchange?

We ran a developer community experiment at Razorpay — gave 200 developers early API access with zero marketing. 40% became organic advocates. Developer trust > developer marketing. Looking to chat with folks doing consumer community plays — want to see the other side.

Freshworks pricing insight: we A/B tested annual vs monthly default on the pricing page across 6 geos. India and SEA strongly prefer monthly, US/EU prefer annual. Localization isn't just language — it's business model. Anyone doing India-first D2C pricing? Would love to compare notes.

Looking for a growth-minded co-founder for NutriBox. We have product-market fit and revenue, but I need someone who can own the entire growth engine — performance marketing, retention, referrals. If you know someone cracked, please intro me.

Learnings from running 200+ A/B tests at Swiggy Instamart: most teams over-index on statistical significance and under-index on practical significance. A 2% lift that ships in a week beats a 5% lift that takes a month to validate. Speed of learning > precision of measurement.
